reach_why: Extends familiar path-dependence and theory-choice worries, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links pre-mathematical uncertainty, framework-relative simplicity, and compounding search lock-in.
falsifiable_why: Partly testable in simulations and historical cases, but key terms remain theory-laden and hard to operationalize.
explanation: Early uncertain judgments can self-reinforce, steering discovery toward entrenched but later-unjustified frameworks.
